title: Legendary Survival Overhaul
description: Temperature, thirst, limbs management, health overhaul for Survival game!
body:
![LSO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68fe59ec2cf6de438b8c470e7afa579815c9d6c2.png) # [](https://www.youtube.com/@MinecraftLegendaryEdition/featured) Legendary Survival Overhaul is a highly configurable mod that upgrades the survival aspect of Minecraft. It comes with :  - Immersive temperature system 🌡️ - Thirst mechanic integrated with temperatures 💧 - Accurate localized body damage system with healing items and secondary effects ⛑️ - Bonus hearts, Broken hearts and Shield hearts to balance the overall new challenging difficulty ❤️ ![temperature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b052d40ca61b2747c9003f4b508527ddd1db1df8.png) New immersive temperature system based on multiple environmental factors. ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b93e834e677bcb6491bb2762137bd9b5ce20bdea.png) Watch your temperature carefully to prevent unexpected death. ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd45fc65fa054083d3fe4b33a5d7eb1f8e602ad2.png) New coating system on armors with a sewing table to stabilize your temperature  ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/563dc9654976e4516a4f71630c9c7bf03f217c61_0.webp) New plants related to temperature. Find ferns in biomes to create temperature potions and insulate your armors.  ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd0b0ac36b43ee0587354ca4856c7d753091e26.png) Growing sun / ice ferns get you a small chance to have a golden sun / ice fern, used to craft a temperature immunity potion. New blocks to manage your body temperature.  These will cool down the space around them when activated. Automatically detects if you're inside a house to spread the temperature effect further.  ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36edcbae4d4c6c4da5adbc940adfba87050cfbe4.png) Temperature increases food consumption when you're too cold. ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4879628ac633c82ad3964296b84549fc52ad6225.png) Legendary Survival Overhaul is compatible with Serene Seasons ! Craft a calendar to know which seasons you are in // Craft a thermometer to know the exact temperature : ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5db8e7dc63dbb90db85302c537b6e549022dc34.png) Hot & Cold biomes now have new outfits to survive the harsh weather. You can craft them or find them in biomes loot tables. ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463d11b4edca6c78d43f86bec4704ab34b8b6a7b.png) Depending on the type of food you'll ingest, you will increase or decrease your body temperature. ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce1d3a5a21571e5b221307e274b845f66e31b5d.png) (Compatibility with Farmer's Delight, Crockpot, etc...) 4 new baubles are introduced (Compatibility with Curios). You can find them here :
Spoiler Heat Resistance Ring : Desert Pyramid Cold Resistance Ring : Bastion Treasure Thermal Resistance Craftable Sponge : by fishing
The temperature system is highly configurable. Here is a list of the things you can tweak :
Spoiler Modify the player's temperature inertia  Adjust all temperature impacts from - both - the world and the player Enable/Disable the secondary effects on hunger and thirst based on the temperature Enable season cards to alert seasons modification (Only with Serene Seasons) Enable & adjust the player's temperature immunity on death & at first spawn Disable the natural regeneration of Minecraft Disable the vanilla Freeze effect of Minecraft (in Power Snow) Modify the temperature resistance provided by the coating mechanism Modify the player's wetness impact on temperature Adjust the wetness behavior and define mounts that immune to the wetness Define the biomes where ice and sun ferns should spawn Redefine all biome temperatures (The minecraft biome temperature is used by default), via Datapack Define new blocks and equipments (including curios) that impact player's temperature & resistances, via Datapack Define new food that impact player's temperature, via Datapack Adjust Season temperatures for Ecliptic Seasons mod or Serene Seasons mod Define the fuel capacity items for the ice box and the heater, via Datapack Adjust origin temperatures for Origins mod, via Datapack
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0e9472f7b82073a5a17ff3ef99bcb5ec92ee7d9.png) The thirst mechanic adds a new hydration bar that follows the same logic as the vanilla hunger bar (hydration + hydration saturation). ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90cec0d7e7c30879c045db5d3fd6d9ec88abf557.png) Every actions will consume a bit of hydration.  Just as temperature, this feature is highly configurable. The hydration system interacts with the temperature system. Hot temperature will increase your thirst bar exhaustion. ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/118d45f67a351c9f086763a52eea4f6e9adc56bf.png) To hydrate yourself, you can drink directly by right-clicking on a water block with an empty hand. Be careful though, dirty water can get you thirsty easily. (Hunger effect for thirst) ![thirst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10262c1d6f307eb8d54ad095e6b8eb5a2c3ba860.png) Water can be purified with furnaces. Purified water will give hydration saturation. Water can be stored in canteens. Looking up and pressing right-click when it's raining will make you drink clean rain water. ![canteen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a26798d91db5a24755f6612f1c30b54785f94bc.png) New plants & juices are added to go along with the hydration system. ![juices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c8960d03c1b08ab22bae396ddbf9b80ac339edc.png) 8 new baubles are introduced (Compatibility with Curios) ![baubles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d89d78a6fac2c07bce1d29ae2a14d1b9a892c2.png) You can find them here :
Spoiler Water Purifier : Loot on Drowned (No thirst effect when drinking dirty water) Thermometer : Craftable (Gives your body temperature in real time) Nether Chalice : bartering with piglins (You can drink lava) Sponge : Loot with fishing (You can't get wet from rain and water) Heat Resistance Ring : Loot in desert temples (+3°C of heat resistance) Cold Resistance Ring : Loot in Nether Bastions (+3°C of cold resistance) Thermal Resistance Ring : Craftable by combining both rings (+3°C of both temperature resistances) First Aid Supplies : Loot in Pillager Outposts (Your limbs regenerate passively all the time)
The thirst system is highly configurable. Here is a list of the things you can tweak :
Spoiler Adjust all player actions cost in hydration  Define the hydration, saturation, effect chance & effect name for modded or vanilla blocks, via Datapack Define the hydration, saturation, effect chance & effect name for modded or vanilla edibles, via Datapack Adjust the Thirst Effect strength and its time accumulation Modify the dehydration damage scaling Adjust canteens behavior and charges Define the biomes where the water plant should spawn Tweak hydration values for some origins
![t](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad3fc44f7ed4dc82455c3309aaa8874181519a7d.png) The localized body damage is inspired by the mechanic of Fallout games that splits the limbs health and the players health.   Each damage will be attributed as accurately as possible to a specific limb. Press H to open player limbs menu. ![limbs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a713a1b8637a4236bed84dbae7e9bfb8ba539ebf.png) Broken limbs now have specific harmful effects, such as headache, vulnerability and hard falling. ![effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f33279aa5296d405b3f31f84dc3b4418cd8f5a3.png) Projectile Head damages are doubled. Wear a Helmet ! Limbs will need to be repaired by using healing items. ![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5c2f2398c440b8eb16414a9728b647120a2cc87.png) Here is a list of the effects linked to every limb damages Head = Headache (periodic blindness) Body = Vulnerability (All damages are 20% stronger per level) Arms = Weakness (one arm) & Mining Fatigue (both arms) Legs = Hard Falling (1 & 2) Feet = Slowness (1 & 2) The body damage system is highly configurable. Here is a list of the things you can tweak :
Spoiler Adjust limbs health (dynamic or static values) Adjust the First Aid Supplies efficiency and boosted effect Modify the power of healing items Add, remove or modify the effects applied by wounded limbs Modify the headshot bonus damage Define how much food is exhausted while while limb regenerates Define for new damages sources the limbs it should target, via Datapack Define healing properties onto the body limbs for modded or vanilla items, via Datapack Define a limb resistance for each armor part, via Datapack
Health Overhaul The Health Overhaul provides few features to both ease and improve the challenge around player health. First of all, it provides a way to increase the player maximum health via 2 new items : The Heart Fragments and the Heart Containers. ![hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/641cae51913bbaec16d89000bdd9776837ed8b7f.png) You can find Heart Fragments here : Buried Treasure Jungle Temple Abandoned Mineshaft Bastion Treasure It also introduces the concept of Broken Heart. ![broken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d2c85437c1d9fa0e42882bbfb838e0469c7ad65.png) Broken Hearts diminishes temporarly the player max health when a limb is fully damaged. Be aware to not let your limbs broken, as the number of Broken Hearts inflicted is proportional to the player maximum health. The Broken Hearts are countered by a newly introduced attribute : the Resilient Hearts. No matter how much Broken Hearts you get, the player will always keep its Resilient Hearts. Finally, the Health Overhaul allows the player to keep the "Absorption Heart" given by the Golden Apple under the name of Shield Hearts. Those Shield Hearts are consumed when losing health, but won't disappear over time. ![shields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/989c104e6a743a44223f511f0bbbab81319db1f6.png) Even if not enabled by default, there is also the possibility to configure a loss of heart upon player's death. And the loss of heart is countered by a newly introduced attribute : the Permanent Hearts. A player won't lose the Permanent Hearts upon death. The health overhaul is highly configurable. Here is a list of the things you can tweak :
Spoiler Adjust the number of Broken Hearts inflicted due to fully damaged limbs Adjust the maximum additional health a player can get via the Heart Containers Adjust the maximum Shield Hearts a player can get via the Golden Apple (or any Absorption Effect) Enable or not the conversion of temporary absorption hearts into permanent Shield Hearts Adjust how much hearts a player lose upon death Configure the default Resilient Hearts and the default Permanent Hearts of the player Configure a new initial health for the players (by default, players start with 20 health = 10 hearts)
Other Features  - The debug screen menu (F3) will hide localization informations  - Compass, clocks and calendars have more infos on right-click or in a frame.  - New message when trying to use bonemeal on crops when the season won't allow it.  - New base hunger exhaustion (useful if you disable the player's natural regeneration)  __**Suggested Mods**__

We suggest using these mod to better fit your LSO experience :

[Serene Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons)  / [Ecliptic Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecliptic-seasons)

[Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)

[Stackable Potions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stackablepotions-forge)

[JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)

[Appleskin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/appleskin)
